Angelina.title: Labour force characteristics by census metropolitan area
Angelina.name: employment_2021.csv
Angelina.description: A dataset containing employment data for various industries.

Michael.title: Population and dwelling counts: Canada and census subdivisions
Michael.name: populationdwellingcount_2016-2021.csv
Michael.description: A dataset containing 2021 and 2016 census data for population and dwelling count.

Alireza.title: Municipal population data broken down into three age groups
Alireza.name: agepopulationdata_2021.csv
Alireza.description: This dataset contains the population data of most municipalities broken down into three age groups  of 0-14, 15-64 and 65+ years old.

Denish.title: Land area by census metropolitan area
Denish.name: landarea_2021.csv
Denish.description: This dataset provides the land area for each municipality in Canada, based on data from Statistics Canada

Florence.title: Knowledge of Official Languages: Canada, provinces and territories and census subdivisions
Florence.name: officiallanguages_2021.csv
Florence.description: A dataset containing the knowledge of official languages in Canada, provinces and territories and census subdivisions with a population 5,000 or more.

Andrew.title: Visible Minorities: Census divisions
Andrew.name: visualminorities_2021.csv
Andrew.description: This dataset provides how many people belong to each visual minority group, and what share they represent within each municipality

Akshini.title: Immigrant status and period of immigration by gender and age: Canada, provinces and territories
Akshini.name: totalimmigration_2016-2021.csv
Akshini.description: This dataset contains the total immigration status and period of immigration including non-immigrants and non-permanant residents in Canada's provinces and territories.
